textByHash.1f77eca01cddaff067c7ae1618b1f64952cbe6a0: Great, can you bake me Pies please.
textByHash.87f01f8a582053c75ccc71301c017c4201f35a5b: Doesn't look like you have any of the Pies I requested.
textByHash.96f9e738f22a0174190196015e9a8802d5359d38: Thank you, if you could bring me the other that'd be great!
textByHash.9b707e2d4941d6ddf6ed317c06a6644f6f84793d: Actually I could, you see I'm running out of stock and I don't have time to bake any more pies. Would you be willing to bake me some pies? I'll pay you well for them.
textByHash.b04aa4c2be5a901563f49d8dd3457cc0589baa62: Hello and welcome to my pie shop, how can I help you?
